definition: A common domesticated carnivore kept as a pet or for work
example: I walk my dog every morning.

definition: A small domesticated carnivorous mammal
example: My cat sleeps on the sofa.

definition: A warm-blooded vertebrate with feathers and wings
example: A bird is singing outside.

definition: A cold-blooded vertebrate living in water
example: I have a fish in my aquarium.

definition: A large domesticated mammal used for riding
example: She rides her horse every weekend.

definition: A small mammal with long ears
example: We have a rabbit as a pet.

definition: To move quickly on foot
example: She runs 5 km every day.

definition: To put food in the mouth and swallow it
example: We eat dinner at 8 pm.

definition: To move at a regular pace on foot
example: I walk to work every morning.

definition: To engage in activity for enjoyment
example: The children play in the park.

definition: To rest in a state of unconsciousness
example: I sleep eight hours a night.

definition: To take liquid into the mouth and swallow
example: She drinks coffee every morning.

definition: Any nutritious substance that organisms consume
example: Healthy food is important for your body.

definition: A staple food made from flour and water
example: I buy fresh bread every morning.

definition: A transparent liquid essential for life
example: Drink at least two litres of water a day.

definition: A white liquid produced by mammals as food for their young
example: She drinks a glass of milk before bed.

definition: A place where meals are prepared and served
example: We had dinner at a nice restaurant.

definition: An occasion when food is eaten
example: Lunch is my favourite meal of the day.

definition: A place where aircraft take off and land
example: We arrived at the airport two hours early.

definition: An establishment providing accommodation
example: We stayed at a five-star hotel.

definition: An official document used for international travel
example: Don't forget your passport!

definition: A piece of paper granting access or travel rights
example: I bought a round-trip ticket to Paris.

definition: To make a journey from one place to another
example: She loves to travel to new countries.

definition: A paid position of regular employment
example: He got a new job at a tech company.

definition: A fixed regular payment from an employer
example: Her salary increased after the promotion.

definition: A gathering of people for a purpose
example: The meeting starts at 9 am.

definition: The state of the atmosphere at a particular time
example: The weather is perfect for a picnic.

definition: Water droplets falling from clouds
example: It rained all day yesterday.

definition: A low temperature; not warm
example: It is very cold in January.

definition: A high temperature; not cold
example: Summer days are hot and sunny.

definition: An institution for educating children
example: She goes to school every weekday.

definition: A person who is studying at a school or university
example: He is a student of medicine.

definition: A set of printed pages bound together
example: I read a book every week.

definition: Feeling or showing pleasure and contentment
example: She was happy when she heard the news.

definition: Feeling unhappy or sorrow
example: He felt sad when his team lost.

definition: An intense feeling of deep affection
example: She loves spending time with her family.

definition: A period of 24 hours
example: I study for two hours every day.

definition: The period from sunrise to noon
example: I exercise in the morning.

definition: A building used as a dwelling
example: They bought a new house last year.

definition: A section of a building enclosed by walls
example: My room is on the second floor.
